entries.title: Canonical chain, memory loop, and Response Composer pass
highlights: OpenClaw and Fabric now participate in the normal ARCOS chat chain
ARC-Memory write-back and search loop are active against ArcVault
Response Composer now preserves Fabric-backed output into the PAI response structure
Transparency and Execution panels expose clearer latest-stage chain outputs

entries.title: ARCOS modular workspace rebuild
highlights: Replaced the old shell with the pocket-grid modular workspace
Added saved layouts, detached panels, and dense ARCOS visual styling
Promoted routing, memory, transparency, execution, and tools into first-class modules

entries.title: Initial packaged ARCOS baseline
highlights: Established the packaged desktop app baseline
Connected local services, model management, and early observability surfaces
